question: How do I place an order?
answer: Simply browse our catalogue at bloomly.co, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. You can pay via credit/debit card, PayPal, Apple Pay, or Google Pay. You will receive a confirmation email within minutes of placing your order.

question: Can I change or cancel my order?
answer: You have a 1-hour window after placing your order to make changes or cancel. Head to My Account > Orders, select the order, and click Edit or Cancel. After 1 hour your order enters our fulfilment process and changes are no longer possible.

question: I placed an order but never received a confirmation email. What should I do?
answer: First check your spam/junk folder. If it's not there, log in to your account and check the Orders section. If the order shows there but you still have no email, contact us at hello@bloomly.co and we'll resend it straight away.

question: Can I place an order without creating an account?
answer: Yes! You can check out as a guest. However, creating a free Bloomly account lets you track your orders, save wishlists, earn Bloom Points, and get faster checkout next time.

question: What are your delivery options?
answer:
We currently offer the following delivery options for UK customers:
• Standard Delivery (3–5 business days) — FREE on orders over £40, otherwise £3.99
• Express Delivery (1–2 business days) — £6.99
• Next-Day Delivery (order before 1 pm) — £9.99
• International Shipping (7–14 business days) — from £12.99

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 30 countries. International orders are fulfilled via Royal Mail International Tracked. Import duties and taxes are the responsibility of the recipient and vary by destination country.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Once your order is dispatched you will receive a shipping confirmation email with a tracking link. You can also track your parcel at any time from My Account > Orders.

question: What happens if my parcel is lost or damaged?
answer: We're really sorry if that's happened! Please contact us within 14 days of your expected delivery date at hello@bloomly.co with your order number and a photo if the item is damaged. We will arrange a replacement or full refund as quickly as possible.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We offer a hassle-free 30-day return policy. Items must be in their original, unused condition with all tags attached. To start a return, visit My Account > Orders and click Return Item.

question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Once we receive your returned item and inspect it (usually within 2–3 business days), your refund will be processed to your original payment method within 5–7 business days. You'll receive an email confirmation when your refund is on its way.

question: Do I have to pay for return postage?
answer: If the item is faulty or we made an error, return postage is on us. For change-of-mind returns, a £2.99 return label fee is deducted from your refund.

question: Can I exchange an item?
answer: Currently we don't offer direct exchanges. The quickest way to get the right item is to return the original and place a new order. Your refund will be processed as soon as we receive the return.
